formats.description: EROFS read-only rootfs image, if guest kernel supports it

dax.reason: Capsem KVM rootfs is currently virtio-blk backed. DAX requires a separate virtiofs-DAX or pmem-style mapping path, so this harness records it as a capability audit item rather than pretending a block image can exercise DAX.
